Title: MY EDC Terminal (BSN)
Content:
Xendit Stakeholders

Department

PIC

PIC Role

Partnership

Musa Sharuddin, Aisya Shafie

Partnership PIC

Product

Zian Wei Lee

Chief Product

In-Person Payment

Muhammad Norzariman Razari, Ngoc Thach Le (runi), Prateek Chaturvedi

In-Person Payment

Admin

Musharifa

Admin

Partner PIC

Name

Email

Elise

farmwanshin@bsn.com.my

Celia

celiachong.bsn@gmail.com

Eligibility

Entity Type

Eligible

Local Domestic MY Entity Sdn Bhd / Bhd

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity Sole Prop

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity Association

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity LLP / Partnership

✅

Foreign Entity

❌

Local / Foreign Individual

❌

Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirements

High Risk

  • Future Services

  • Membership

  • Future sales

Non Face to Face

  • Telesales

  • Online/MOTO

MCC Description

  • 5122 Drugs, Drug Proprietaries, Druggist Sundries.

  • 5912 Drug Stores, Pharmacies.

  • 5962 Direct Marketing – Travel-Related Arrangement Services.

  • 5966 Direct Marketing – Outbound Telemarketing Merchants.

  • 5967 Direct Marketing – Inbound Telemarketing Merchants.

  • 5993 Cigar Stores and Stands, for Merchants that sell cigarettes in a Card-

  • Absent Environment.

  • 7995 Betting, including Lottery Tickets, Casino Gaming Chips, Off-Track

  • Betting, and Wagers at Race Tracks.

Non Target Market

  • Airline / Carrier

  • Computer Network / Information Services

  • Wire Transfer Money Orders (Non FI)

  • Watches , Metals, Precious Stone Jewelry (Wholesales)

  • Casino (illegally operated)

  • Direct Marketing

  • Antiques / Painting dealer / Pawn Shop

  • Drugs / Pharmaceutical

  • Clubs / Dating Services

  • Massage Parlor

Prohibited Business

  • Any illegal Business /services as designed by BNM/ Card Schemes

  • By Country

    • AMLA

    • US Sanction countries

SLA

Entity Origin

SLA

Documents Preparing

3 WD

Merchant Documents Preparation and Execution

5-7 WD

Online Submission to BSN

1 WD

Approval from BSN

3-5 WD (provided no resubmission required)

Terminal Set Up

1-3 WD after device payment

Terminal Deployment

Klang Valley - 1 WD via Grab express

Outside Klang Valley - 3-5 WD depending on courier service

Total SLA

14-21 WD

Terminal Model & Specification

Vendor

Sharecommerce

Terminal Model

MF919

Specification

i. Only Visa / Mastercard

ii. Credit / debit card

iii. Not available for E-wallet / QR

External terminal user guide

Payex Terminal User Guide (25.6.2025).docx

Supporting Documents Required per Entity Type

Entity Type

Supporting Documents for submission

Sole Prop (home based)

i. Products / Service Pricing list

ii. Product photos

Sole Prop (offline shop)

i. External building, signboard, entrance photo (2-3 angles)

ii. Interior photos (2-3 angles)

iii. Service pricing list

Sdn Bhd (offline shop)

i. External building, signboard, entrance photo (2-3 angles)

ii. Interior photos (2-3 angles)

iii. Service pricing list

Association (ie JMB, JMC, Non Profit Org etc)

i. IC copy for President, Secretary, Treasurer

ii. Organisation Chart

iii. Full Executed and original sighted Minutes of Meeting (meeting involve agenda for BSN terminal application)

iv. External building, signboard, entrance photo (2-3 angles)

v. Interior photos (2-3 angles)

vi. Association Certificate / Business Registration Certificate

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

1a. Sales Representative will pitch selling to merchant and submit workflow in #mo-request on behalf as the activation is not available to merchant dashboard yet (TBA)

Request Example:

1b. MO needs to ensure merchant agree with the pricing details as per below to proceed:

  • Local Debit Cards : 0.80%

  • Local Credit Cards: 1.1%

  • Foreign Cards: 2.6%

  • Device price: RM850 one off inclusive of 1 year sim card (annual renewal)

     

Sales/AM/OIM

MO Process Merchant’s Request

2

2a. MO will acknowledge the request and start preparing the documents. All required submission documents can be accessed in BSN TPA Forms

2b. MO will prepare the forms required and send self serve email to merchant for execution and return to us:

i. the executed forms with company stamp affix to each forms (can be e-sign & e-stamp); and

ii. supporting documents required per entity type

Email Example:

MO

Submission to BSN

3

3a. MO will receive merchant email on the executed documents and all supporting documents required and proceed with assessing the documents to ensure it meets BSN requirements.

3b. MO will proceed to:

i. fill up the BSN Submission tracker with submission to BSN via email

ii. Create merchant folder in BSN submission under the submission batch (ie XM0029 etc) which this folder also shared to BSN for their review

iii. MO will proceed to submit the application via email (operation@payex.io) to BSN

Submission example:

iv. MO will monitor feedback from BSN through WAG and email for any resubmission / further information required (if any)

v. MO will receive approval from BSN via email

Approval email sample:

vi. MO will create a payment link in Payex portal and share to the same thread in slack on the Terminal request for Sales/Am/OIM share the same to merchants to make payment. Once payment made, Sales/AM/OIM to inform MO for next steps.

MO/ Sales/AM/OIM

Activation Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

EDC Terminal configuration

1

MO to fill up the vendor tracker in Sharecom x Payex - MM Sheet and set up the BID in in-person retool. BID & TID (Terminal ID) registration to connect the terminal to merchants’ BID and Xendit dashboard

Step

Action

Tools / Links

1

BID registration

  • prod-dev https://retool.tidnex.com/apps/6079d8d0-8172-11f0-a0eb-ff2bc5e41c84/EDC/Terminal%20Business%20Registration%20Prod-dev/page1

  • prod-live https://retool.tidnex.com/apps/45ecd176-828e-11f0-a7e9-fbb6cd17871c/EDC/Terminal%20Business%20Registration%20Prod-live/page1

2

TID registration

  • prod-dev https://retool.tidnex.com/apps/e4f669d6-2b08-11f0-ab12-93c2304f9267/EDC/Terminal%20Devices%20Management%20Prod%20Dev

  • prod-live https://retool.tidnex.com/apps/642b470e-7a46-11ef-b5f3-dba43b829f8f/EDC/Terminal%20Devices%20Management%20Prod%20Live

3

For special rates merchants, go to retool to submit the special rates (either higher or lower rates)

https://retool.tidnex.com/apps/a48b7f28-ee05-11ec-b5c7-23f8f03643a0/Billing/create-drs

4

Update the config tracker

In-Person Payments Merchant Config Tracker

5

MO to inform the team on #in-person-payment slack when we have new live merchants

MO / Musharifa

2

4b. Once done, MO to notify PIC for installing and EDC configuration in EDC MY-BSN Channel for PIC (Musharifa) to create profile in Sharecommerce Portal following the Sharecommerce Portal - Profile Manual Userguide

Notification example:

3

EDC terminal will be configured, tested and deployed to the stated address and MO will receive the delivery tracker (via Grab express) or airway bill (via local courier)

EDC Terminal Deployment

4

MO will share the same to the same slack thread and inform that the terminal has done the set up and delivered to the merchant with delivery tracker/proof.

MO to provide inform merchant via the same email thread / communication on documents signing to inform:

  1. Delivery proof

  2. ID Information forms

  3. BSN testing kit

  4. EDC Terminal Userguide

Merchant has to return and reply email of the duly executed ID Information forms (e-sign acceptable) and return MO to return to Musharifa via the same slack request for EDC terminal testing safekeeping and share to BSN

5c. EDC terminal process completed

5

MO to provide inform merchant via the same email thread / communication on documents signing to inform:

  1. Delivery proof

  2. ID Information forms

  3. BSN testing kit

  4. EDC Terminal Userguide

Merchant has to return and reply email of the duly executed ID Information forms (e-sign acceptable) and return MO to return to Musharifa via the same slack request for EDC terminal testing safekeeping and share to BSN

5c. EDC terminal process completed

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

When a merchant fails to meet BSN’s onboarding criteria, the MO agent is responsible for notifying the merchant directly.

MO

2.

This is a manual "self-serve" process. The MO agent must send a manual email update to the merchant informing them of the rejection result.

MO also needs to inform other stakeholders via the slack thread of the original request.

3.

All rejection notifications must be sent using the official Merchant Operations email: merchantops@xendit.co.

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

1a. Sales Representative will pitch selling to merchant and submit workflow in #mo-request on behalf as the activation is not available to merchant dashboard yet (TBA)

Request Example:

1b. MO needs to ensure merchant agree with the pricing details as per below to proceed:

  • Local Debit Cards : 0.80%
  • Local Credit Cards: 1.1%
  • Foreign Cards: 2.6%
  • Device price: RM850 one off inclusive of 1 year sim card (annual renewal)

Sales/AM/OIM

MO Process Merchant’s Request

2

2a. MO will acknowledge the request and start preparing the documents. All required submission documents can be accessed in BSN TPA Forms

2b. MO will prepare the forms required and send self serve email to merchant for execution and return to us:

i. the executed forms with company stamp affix to each forms (can be e-sign & e-stamp); and

ii. supporting documents required per entity type

Email Example:

MO

Submission to BSN

3

3a. MO will receive merchant email on the executed documents and all supporting documents required and proceed with assessing the documents to ensure it meets BSN requirements.

3b. MO will proceed to:

i. fill up the BSN Submission tracker with submission to BSN via email

ii. Create merchant folder in BSN submission under the submission batch (ie XM0029 etc) which this folder also shared to BSN for their review

iii. MO will proceed to submit the application via email (operation@payex.io) to BSN

Submission example:

iv. MO will monitor feedback from BSN through WAG and email for any resubmission / further information required (if any)

v. MO will receive approval from BSN via email

Approval email sample:

vi. MO will create a payment link in Payex portal and share to the same thread in slack on the Terminal request for Sales/Am/OIM share the same to merchants to make payment. Once payment made, Sales/AM/OIM to inform MO for next steps.

MO/ Sales/AM/OIM

MO / Musharifa

2

4b. Once done, MO to notify PIC for installing and EDC configuration in EDC MY-BSN Channel for PIC (Musharifa) to create profile in Sharecommerce Portal following the Sharecommerce Portal - Profile Manual Userguide

Notification example:

3

EDC terminal will be configured, tested and deployed to the stated address and MO will receive the delivery tracker (via Grab express) or airway bill (via local courier)

EDC Terminal Deployment

4

MO will share the same to the same slack thread and inform that the terminal has done the set up and delivered to the merchant with delivery tracker/proof.

MO to provide inform merchant via the same email thread / communication on documents signing to inform:

  1. Delivery proof
  2. ID Information forms
  3. BSN testing kit
  4. EDC Terminal Userguide

Merchant has to return and reply email of the duly executed ID Information forms (e-sign acceptable) and return MO to return to Musharifa via the same slack request for EDC terminal testing safekeeping and share to BSN

5c. EDC terminal process completed

5

MO to provide inform merchant via the same email thread / communication on documents signing to inform:

  1. Delivery proof
  2. ID Information forms
  3. BSN testing kit
  4. EDC Terminal Userguide

Merchant has to return and reply email of the duly executed ID Information forms (e-sign acceptable) and return MO to return to Musharifa via the same slack request for EDC terminal testing safekeeping and share to BSN

5c. EDC terminal process completed

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

When a merchant fails to meet BSN’s onboarding criteria, the MO agent is responsible for notifying the merchant directly.

MO

2.

This is a manual "self-serve" process. The MO agent must send a manual email update to the merchant informing them of the rejection result.

MO also needs to inform other stakeholders via the slack thread of the original request.

3.

All rejection notifications must be sent using the official Merchant Operations email: merchantops@xendit.co.
